data.title: In 2025, institutions drive crypto growth: HSBC and BNP join Canton, billion-dollar treasuries rise, Gemini eyes IPO, gold in IRAs.
data.description: By 2025, financial institutions HSBC and BNP Paribas are leading the way as they partner with Canton. Additionally, billion-dollar crypto treasuries are on the rise. Cryptocurrency exchange Gemini is considering going public through an IPO. Furthermore, Gold is being tokenized and introduced into Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), marking a significant development in the financial sector.

data.title: 4DMT grants 40,900 RSUs to 4 new non-executive employees as part of employment inducement plan.
data.description: On September 9, 2025, in Emeryville, California, 4D Molecular Therapeutics (Nasdaq: FDMT) awarded 40,900 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to four new non-executive employees. This grant was made under the 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan approved by the Company's board of directors in February 2025. The purpose of this equity grant, which falls under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market, is to incentivize new employees to join the biotechnology company. 4D Molecular Therapeutics is known for its innovative therapies that aim to revolutionize treatment approaches and enhance patient outcomes significantly.

data.title: NewLake Capital Partners declares $0.43 per share dividend for Q3 2025.
data.description: In New Canaan, Connecticut on September 12, 2025, NewLake Capital Partners, Inc. (OTCQX: NLCP), a prominent real estate capital provider for state-licensed cannabis operators, revealed that the board of directors has sanctioned a $0.43 per share cash dividend for the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Bentley Systems (Nasdaq: BSY) declares $0.07 per share dividend for third quarter 2025, payable on Sep 30 to stockholders.
data.description: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Bentley Systems, a leading infrastructure engineering software company listed under Nasdaq as BSY, has disclosed its recent dividend news. The Board of Directors has approved a dividend payment of $0.07 per share for the third quarter of 2025. Shareholders of both Class A and Class B common stock are eligible for this dividend. The payment date is set for September 30, 2025, and individuals recorded as stockholders by the end of business on September 23, 2025, will receive this cash dividend. Bentley Systems is globally recognized for providing essential software to infrastructure professionals.

data.title: Solana price hits yearly peak with over $700M in SOL bought by Galaxy Digital, possibly tied to treasury firm.
data.description: On Friday, Solana reached its highest price level since January after experiencing significant activity with Galaxy making large purchases, possibly connected to a treasury firm.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market rallies on Friday, Ethereum surpasses Bitcoin. Notable prices: BTC $116,472.19 ETH $4,622.66 XRP $3.07 DOGE $0.2710 SHIB $0.00001360. 116,316 traders were liquidated for $329.54 million in the past 24 hours. Top gainers: MYX, M, PUMP. Bitcoin outpaced by silver-backed crypto in 2025. Max Keiser predicts an upside for silver. Tether set to launch. (Character count: 336)
data.description: On Friday, the cryptocurrency market saw an uptick with Ethereum surpassing Bitcoin. Current prices show Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $116,472.19, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $4,622.66, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $240.59, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $3.07, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.2710, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.00001360. Coinglass data revealed that 116,316 traders were liquidated within the last 24 hours, totaling $329.54 million. Top performers during this period were MYX Finance (CRYPTO: MYX), MemeCore (CRYPTO: M), and Pump. Fun (CRYPTO: PUMP). Additionally, news emerged about Bitcoin being outpaced by a silver-backed cryptocurrency in 2025, with Max Keiser, a noted Bitcoin bull, foreseeing positive prospects for precious metals. Tether is also set to launch soon. For further details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MavenAI & Engrain partner to automate all-in apartment pricing for renters, integrating transparent fees in Google Profiles.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, MavenAI and Engrain have collaborated to streamline apartment pricing processes, making all-inclusive fees transparent through MavenAI-powered Google Business Profiles.

data.title: WisdomTree launches tokenized private credit fund amid $16B market surge. Tokenized alternative funds gain traction in onchain finance shift.
data.description: The adoption of tokenized private credit and other alternative funds is steadily increasing, with a noticeable shift from the traditional financial system to blockchain technology. This transition is evidenced by a growing number of investors embracing tokenization for their alternative investments.
